hard_stops.logic: project must be initialized before any environmental or cultural review activities begin
recognized environmental conditions from Phase I/II remain unresolved — cannot proceed to closing or construction
project activity may impact endangered species habitat — Endangered Species Act compliance required before proceeding
Section 106 historic preservation review is incomplete — required for any project involving federal funding or permits

soft_flags.logic: environmental remediation is behind schedule — may impact project timeline
environmental permits expiring within 30 days — renewal action required
brownfield program enrollment is still pending — track status for liability protection
wetland mitigation requirements have not been fully satisfied — Army Corps compliance at risk
